# Welcome to GmshSTL.jl {#Welcome-to-GmshSTL.jl}

GmshSTL.jl generates volumetric tetrahedral meshes from STL files using Gmsh.

## Getting Started {#Getting-Started}

```julia
using GmshSTL
```


See the tutorial:

[Getting started](tutorials/getting-started.md)

## API Reference {#API-Reference}

See the API documentation:

[API Reference](api.md)
